All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

D

daemonThreads() - Static method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Names the threads and marks them daemon so a missed SchedulerService.shutdown() can never keep the JVM alive.
dao - Variable in class server.control.AuthController
Authentication data access (login, single-login lock).
dao - Variable in class server.control.NotificationController
Notification data access.
dao - Variable in class server.control.NotificationService
Stateless DAO collaborator, shared across all client threads.
dao - Variable in class server.control.ReservationController
Reservation data access (CRUD, capacity, waiting list).
daoError(Throwable) - Static method in class server.util.ServerLog
Logs a DAO failure as [DAO] <Class>.<method> failed: <message> followed by the stack trace.
DashboardController - Class in client.view
Dashboard: a role-aware overview that greets the logged-in actor, shows a few real summary cards plus an attention line, and offers a quick-link launchpad.
DashboardController(NetworkService, Session, Navigator) - Constructor for class client.view.DashboardController
Creates the dashboard controller.
data - Variable in class common.dto.ClientRequest
Named request parameters keyed by name.
data - Variable in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Optional response payload (a DTO or list), or null.
dataRow(NotificationDTO, boolean) - Method in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Builds one notification row (with an Acknowledge action when unread).
dataRow(ParameterChangeRequestDTO, boolean) - Method in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Builds one request row: details plus Approve/Reject buttons.
dataRow(ReservationDTO, boolean) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Builds one reservation row: info cells, status tag, and the action buttons.
dataRow(WaitlistEntryDTO, boolean) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Builds one waiting-list row: an offer row (countdown + Accept/Decline) or a plain WAITING row (status + Leave).
date - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow
The calendar day the status changed, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
DATE_FMT - Static variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Date format for the next-visit card (e.g.
datePicker - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Visit-date picker.
datePicker - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Visit-date picker.
daysInRange(String, String) - Method in class server.dao.ReportDAO
Number of calendar days the inclusive range [from, to] spans, used as the avgPerDay denominator.
DBConnection - Class in server.db
Manages the connection to the system's MySQL database.
DBConnection() - Constructor for class server.db.DBConnection
Creates the database-connection helper.
DEBUG_QUICK_LOGIN - Static variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Dev escape hatch: when true, the seeded-account "Quick login" row is built and shown.
decide(int, boolean) - Method in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Approves or rejects a request, then reloads the queue on success.
decide(int, ChangeStatus, int) - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Records a decision (approve/reject) on a request, stamping decided_by and decided_at.
decidedAt - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
When the request was decided (string form), or null while PENDING.
decidedBy - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Department manager who decided it (user.id), or null while PENDING.
DEFAULT_STAY_MINUTES - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ParamField
The default visit length in minutes (park.default_stay_minutes).
defaultStayMinutes - Variable in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Default visit length, in minutes.
deleted(String, long) - Static method in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Builds a DELETED event.
DELETED - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.EventOp
An entity instance was removed on the server.
DEPT_MANAGER - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.Role
Department manager overseeing all parks.
DEPT_MANAGER_ONLY - Static variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Visible to the department-manager role only.
detailsBody() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Returns the step-1 body: date, optional time, and party-size inputs.
DEV_PASSWORD - Static variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Shared password of every seeded account in setup.sql.
dispatch(ServerEvent) - Method in class client.net.EventBus
Looks up the subscriber list for the event's (entity, entityId) pair and fan-outs to each callback via Platform.runLater(java.lang.Runnable).
DomainController - Interface in server.control
A handler for one domain's slice of the server's request space (orders, reservations, parks, …).
DotEnv - Class in server.db
Tiny .env loader for the server's database credentials, so secrets such as the MySQL password live in an untracked file rather than in source.
DotEnv() - Constructor for class server.db.DotEnv
Creates the .env loader (state and operations are static).
